hero.title: Abdelrahman Ragab Abdelbaky
hero.description: Frontend Developer with hands-on experience building real-world e-commerce and LMS platforms using React, Next.js, and Magento 2. Focused on performance optimization (Core Web Vitals), scalable UI architecture, and delivering smooth multilingual (AR/EN) experiences with proper RTL/LTR support. Experienced in building GraphQL-powered PWAs, SSR applications, and handling complex marketplace workflows within Agile teams.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Reach out to me for more details and stay updated with my latest projects.
contact.successMessage: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully. 👌

1.title: Website Builder Platform (Graduation Project)
1.description: A comprehensive website builder showcasing advanced web development techniques.
1.details: This project provides a powerful platform for creating and customizing websites. It includes various features for building and managing website sections, templates, and content, demonstrating a deep understanding of web development principles and techniques. The application supports switching between Arabic and English, enhancing accessibility and user experience for a diverse audience. Users can customize styles using a user-friendly interface, preview their changes in real-time, and generate content using AI. Additionally, the application allows users to arrange and choose between various sections, ensuring a flexible and tailored web design experience. This project represents the culmination of skills acquired during studies, incorporating responsive design practices and best coding standards.

2.title: Product CRUD Dashboard
2.description: A CRUD management system for products with analysis features.
2.details: This project enables users to efficiently manage products by providing functionalities for adding, editing, and deleting product information. It includes a detailed analysis page that offers insights and visual representations of key product metrics. Utilizing Redux Toolkit for state management ensures a seamless user experience. SweetAlert enhances interactions with confirmation prompts and notifications, contributing to a polished interface. The application is optimized for performance, ensuring quick response times and an intuitive design that boosts productivity.

3.title: My portfolio
3.description: A personal portfolio website showcasing Abdelrahman Ragab's work and projects.
3.details: This portfolio website highlights personal projects, skills, and experiences. It includes sections for showcasing projects, a resume, contact information, and more. It is designed to effectively present Abdelrahman Ragab's professional profile.

4.title: Quran App
4.description: A React application to display Quranic verses with audio playback features.
4.details: This project offers a comprehensive interface for reading and listening to Quranic verses. It includes key features such as verse-by-verse audio playback, navigation between surahs and ayahs, and an auto-play functionality that continues audio playback as the user navigates to the next verse. The app effectively manages state using Redux Toolkit to track the current surah, ayah, and playback progress, ensuring a smooth and responsive user experience. Additionally, the project includes dark mode support for comfortable reading and persistent state, which saves the user's progress across sessions using local storage. Performance optimization is also a priority, managing audio files and verse data efficiently while maintaining quick response times.

5.title: Restaurant Market
5.description: An e-commerce website for a restaurant and market  featuring product listings and cart functionality.
5.details: This project combines the functionalities of both a restaurant and market into a single e-commerce platform. Users can effortlessly browse products, add items to their cart, and complete orders with ease. The platform features a clean, intuitive design, ensuring an enhanced user experience. It includes key sections such as CTA to encourage user interaction, a dedicated features section highlighting the unique aspects of the platform, and a testimonials section showcasing customer feedback. These elements work together to provide a professional and engaging user experience.

6.title: Designshub Courses Platform
6.description: A custom web platform using Next.js and Tailwind CSS for graphic design courses, with responsive landing pages and a modern UI for seamless navigation.
6.details: The platform is optimized for user engagement, featuring a modern and responsive design for all screen sizes. The landing page showcases essential features and benefits of the courses, designed with Tailwind CSS for fast, mobile-first design and smooth animations. This project demonstrates expertise in building highly interactive landing pages that capture user attention and promote seamless course enrollment.

7.title: Game Hub Website
7.description: A dynamic platform built as a central hub for discovering and exploring a wide variety of games.
7.details: This project is a comprehensive gaming platform designed to help users discover and explore new games. It features an interactive and engaging interface with organized game lists and search functionalities, offering a seamless user experience. The design focuses on creating an intuitive browsing experience with responsive layouts, ensuring compatibility across multiple devices. Built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, the platform incorporates interactive elements to enhance the user journey.

8.title: Restaurant Landing Page
8.description: A visually appealing and highly responsive restaurant landing page.
8.details: This project highlights a sleek and professional landing page for a restaurant, built with a focus on responsive design and smooth user experience across all devices. Key features include prominent call-to-action sections, high-quality visuals, and seamless navigation. The page is designed to capture visitor interest and drive conversions through clear messaging and engaging layouts. Developed using React for dynamic content updates, ensuring scalability and performance optimization.

9.title: Web Developer Showcase
9.description: A professional portfolio website created to showcase web development skills, technologies.
9.details: This portfolio website serves as a professional showcase for various web development projects, skills, and expertise. It presents a comprehensive view of web development proficiency through a well-structured layout and interactive sections. The project focuses on clean design, and responsive features to engage visitors while presenting projects in a visually appealing format.

10.title: Almasry Pharmacy — ECommerce PWA
10.description: A production Magento PWA Studio storefront for an online pharmacy in an Arabic/RTL market, built on Venia with 100+ custom UI components and 50+ Peregrine talons, a checkout supporting 7 payment methods, and an optimized image pipeline.
10.details: A production Magento PWA Studio storefront for an online pharmacy in an Arabic/RTL market, built on Venia with 100+ custom UI components and 50+ Peregrine hooks (talons). Includes a checkout with 7 payment methods, an RxJS event system feeding GA4, Arabic/English support, an optimized image pipeline with a Workbox service worker, auto-translate for foreign visitors, and SEO/GEO improvements.

detailGroups.title: Overview
items: A production Magento PWA Studio storefront for an online pharmacy in an Arabic/RTL market.
Built on Venia with 100+ custom UI components and 50+ Peregrine hooks (talons).

detailGroups.title: Checkout & Payments
items: Built a checkout that supports 7 payment methods: Braintree, Apple Pay, Checkout.com, Tamara, Tabby, valU, and Cash on Delivery.
Handled carts that split into more than one order, and restored the cart when a payment fails partway so the user can try again.

detailGroups.title: Events & Analytics
items: Added an event system on top of RxJS so analytics and UI parts that load late still receive events that fired earlier.
Connected it to the GA4 dataLayer for cart, checkout, and conversion tracking.

detailGroups.title: Arabic / English Support
items: Added RTL/LTR handling with PostCSS-RTL and React-Intl, plus store-view switching that detects Arabic input and swaps the Magento store view at runtime.
Built a country phone input using the native Intl.DisplayNames API with localized country names and per-country validation.

detailGroups.title: Images & Caching
items: Improved image loading with a pipeline that switches between Cloudflare image transforms and a backend service depending on the source, serving WebP/JPG/PNG.
Set up a Workbox service worker with different caching strategies for images, JS, and HTML for faster loads and offline support.

detailGroups.title: Auto-Translate for Foreign Visitors
items: Detects the visitor's browser language: Arabic/English visitors see no change, while other languages get the store auto-translated via Google Translate with a small bar to switch or reset.

detailGroups.title: SEO & GEO
items: Improved SEO/GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) across the storefront: added canonical URLs, hreflang tags for the bilingual pages, and Open Graph / Twitter Card tags.

Added and fixed structured data (JSON-LD): Product, Organization, AggregateRating, BreadcrumbList, a Person schema for the founder, and FAQPage — and cleaned up meta descriptions and broken image URLs.

11.title: SPC Online Academy — Medical LMS
11.description: A medical learning platform (LMS) built with Next.js (App Router) and React 19, with public, student, and instructor areas. Includes a custom HLS video player, content protection, and a checkout with multiple payment methods.
11.details: A medical learning platform (LMS) built with Next.js (App Router) and React 19, with public, student, and instructor areas. Includes a custom HLS video player, video content protection, Arabic/English support with RTL/LTR, JWT auth, a checkout with multiple payment methods, and a 96/100 Lighthouse score.

detailGroups.title: Overview
items: A medical learning platform (LMS) built with Next.js (App Router) and React 19, with public, student, and instructor areas.
Set up a clean service layer with Axios, server-side theming to avoid a color flash on load, and a deployment with quick rollback.

detailGroups.title: Video Player
items: Built a custom HLS video player with quality options (Auto/480p/720p/1080p), resume playback, and subtitles in two languages (SRT/VTT).

detailGroups.title: Content Protection
items: Added content protection for the course videos, including a watermark and measures to discourage unauthorized copying.

detailGroups.title: State & Shared Logic
items: Managed app state with Zustand (auth, cart, enrollment, subscription) with instant UI updates that roll back on error, and kept the same state in sync across pages.
Moved shared access logic into reusable hooks so course access and checkout buttons behave the same everywhere across the app.

detailGroups.title: Languages & Auth
items: Added Arabic/English support with RTL/LTR switching, font swapping (Cairo/Inter), and no layout jump when the language changes.
Built JWT auth with silent token refresh, role-based redirects, and route guards, and handled the difference between manual logout and an expired session.

detailGroups.title: Checkout & Payments
items: Built a checkout with card, wallet, cash outlet, and bank installments, with order retry and reliable promo-code handling.

detailGroups.title: Performance, SEO & Analytics
items: Improved performance to a 96/100 Lighthouse score (Desktop) — LCP 0.9s, CLS 0.028, FCP 0.4s — using lazy loading, dynamic imports, and smaller bundles.
Added SEO with JSON-LD, dynamic Open Graph images, a sitemap, and server-rendered metadata in both languages.
Set up GTM/GA4 tracking for the main e-commerce steps and fixed common tracking issues like duplicate and repeated events.

detailGroups.title: Student & Instructor Area
items: Dashboard, course enrollment, certificates, quizzes, and invoices.

12.title: Etlala — Fashion Marketplace
12.description: A Magento 2 fashion marketplace with complex seller workflows, multi-store support, and AR/EN RTL/LTR layouts.
12.details: Extended the Magento 2 frontend using Layout XML, PHTML, RequireJS, and GraphQL for multiple modules. Built reusable UI components across the platform and developed complex marketplace workflows including subscriptions, seller states, and plan upgrades. Supported multi-store AR/EN with RTL/LTR layouts and improved UX with AJAX pagination and dynamic loaders.

items.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
items.projectDescription: Developed a comprehensive website builder platform that enables users to create and customize websites with ease.
projectFeatures: Multiple template options and style customization
items.projectNote: This project demonstrated proficiency in modern web development practices, multilingual support, and advanced user interface design principles.
